name: RPlog_Imperator_Circle_Crestian_Tracer
title: A Conversation in Imperator Circle
summary: In Imperator Circle on Selene, the newly appointed Moff Elana Tracer pauses after a run beneath the statue of the Imperator, wondering aloud what she has gotten herself into on the eve of her return to public life in Damion's New Order. The Sarian Presav-candidate Crestian Tarasar, in earshot, engages her in a long, candid exchange about her motives, his own path, and the nature of the Sith. He explains that he is Sith by ideology rather than by blood or the Force, a former military academy dean turned Sith out of conviction that the order could bring galactic stability, and lays out his political ambitions to rebuild Caspar as a contributing part of the Imperium. The conversation softens Tracer's hostility into something closer to alliance; she admits she cannot walk away from the role for her son's sake, offers her assistance, and asks Crestian to look into a mysterious off-the-books black ops squadron code-named Mercury. Crestian agrees to make inquiries, discusses shipyard and political plans she might aid with, and the two part on newly cordial terms as Tracer departs for a council dinner.
